name: FR 5 — Delete User Account (Soft Deactivate) — 50 Concurrent Users
description: Validate performance and correctness of soft-deleting (deactivating) users via PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} under 50 concurrent deactivations, ensuring response time and success rate targets are met and that deactivated users no longer appear in the active-users listing.
corresponding NFR: Under 50 concurrent deactivations, Max Response Time ≤ 500 ms, Success Rate ≥ 98%, and Data Integrity: deactivated users must not appear in /users/active.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Users should not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

metrics.target: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: Defaults used only where INPUT did not specify: duration_s=300 and think time_s=[1,3]. Data integrity validation requires verifying deactivated users are not returned by /users/active.
